examples: Laura glanced at Grace, expecting a clever riposte.
The US delivered an early riposte to the air attack.
The operation is being seen as a swift riposte to the killing of a senior army commander.
The right has the Tea Party, and the left has, until recently, had no riposte.
The feisty riposte was typical of Mr Baird, who was handed the tricky environment file in January.
